title: senecio murorum
intro: Senecio murorum, also known as Stonecrop or Wall Flower, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio murorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote healthy digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Senecio murorum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
